CREATE TABLE test_values (arg1 VARCHAR(255), arg2 VARCHAR(255));
SELECT ">"(arg1, arg2) AS is_greater FROM test_values;
SELECT arg1, arg2 FROM test_values WHERE ">"(arg1, arg2);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_values WHERE ">"(arg1, arg2);
CREATE TABLE more_values (col1 VARCHAR(255), col2 VARCHAR(255));
SELECT t.arg1, t.arg2 FROM test_values t JOIN more_values m ON ">"(t.arg1, m.col1);
SELECT * FROM test_values WHERE arg1 IN (SELECT col1 FROM more_values WHERE col2 = 'yy') AND ">"(arg1, (SELECT col1 FROM more_values WHERE col2 = 'cc'));
SELECT CASE WHEN ">"('apple', 'banana') THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END AS comparison_result;
